steps.title: Connect age to location
steps.content: Scientists must look away from the Asian hominin formation to find older Ediacaran organisms. The explanation needs to connect the older organisms with a geological formation from an earlier time.

steps.title: Reject unsupported site claims
steps.content: A contradicts the passage's North American example, B makes an unsupported claim about the number of sites, and D wrongly refers to hominins at Mistaken Point. The necessary reason is that the Ediacaran formation is older than the hominin formation. The answer is C.
